de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst

Class ProgramListInstantiation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.InstantiationEntry<ImmutableArray<ProgramElement>>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.ProgramListInstantiation

  • public class ProgramListInstantiation
extends InstantiationEntry<ImmutableArray<ProgramElement>>
    This class is used to store the instantiation of a schemavariable if it is a ProgramElement.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ProgramListInstantiation(ImmutableArray<ProgramElement> pes)
      creates a new ContextInstantiationEntry

      • Methods inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.InstantiationEntry

    • Constructor Detail

      • ProgramListInstantiation

        ProgramListInstantiation(ImmutableArray<ProgramElement> pes)
        creates a new ContextInstantiationEntry
        Parameters:
        pes - the ProgramElement array the SchemaVariable is instantiated with
